belier.intro: The Moon has moved into curious Gemini at 7 degrees, now occupying your third house of communication, while the waning crescent thins further to 12.4 percent illumination. Where yesterday asked you to assess your resources, today's mental, quicker energy invites conversations, errands, and small connections you have been postponing. Neptune retrograde continues its long, quiet work in your own sign beneath all this outward chatter.
belier.love: A light, easy conversation does more for a relationship today than a heavy one. Let humor and everyday talk carry the connection; not every exchange needs to be profound to matter.
belier.work: Emails, calls, and short tasks move quickly under this Gemini Moon. Clear your smaller obligations today so that focus is freed for what the New Moon will soon ask of you.
belier.energy: Mental energy outpaces physical energy today, quick and darting rather than sustained. Channel it into varied short tasks rather than forcing yourself into one long, demanding effort.
belier.intuition: A stray thought or overheard comment carries more significance than it appears to. Write it down before the day's chatter causes you to forget it.
belier.mantra: I let small conversations carry real meaning.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon leaves your own sign and enters Gemini at 7 degrees, settling into your second house of resources as the waning crescent narrows to 12.4 percent light. After yesterday's rare alignment of self and sky, today shifts your attention toward what you own, earn, and value, viewed now through a quicker, more mentally active lens. The Cancer Sun continues warming your third house, favoring honest, unhurried exchange.
taureau.love: A conversation about shared finances or practical plans goes more smoothly today if kept light rather than heavy. Let the Gemini Moon's ease soften what might otherwise feel like a serious discussion.
taureau.work: Reviewing your budget, invoices, or resource allocation benefits from the quicker mental pace today. Multiple small corrections now save you a larger reckoning later.
taureau.energy: Your steady earth energy meets a mentally restless Moon today, which may feel slightly discordant. Balance the mismatch with short breaks between focused tasks rather than pushing through in one long stretch.
taureau.intuition: A financial detail that seemed unimportant deserves a second look; your instinct about numbers is sharper than usual under this Gemini Moon. Trust the small nagging feeling rather than dismissing it as overthinking.
taureau.mantra: I trust the small detail my instinct keeps returning to.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon returns home to your own sign today at 7 degrees Gemini, lighting your first house even as the waning crescent thins to a mere 12.4 percent illumination. This is a subtle homecoming, quieter than usual because so little of the Moon's light remains, but it still favors being fully yourself after yesterday's retreat. Mercury, your ruler, continues retrograde in Cancer, so let your quickness serve listening today rather than only speaking.
gemeaux.love: Your natural wit and curiosity are welcome today, but pair them with real listening given Mercury's retrograde static. A partner may need you to slow your words just slightly to be truly heard.
gemeaux.work: Your own instincts about how to approach a task are more trustworthy today than any borrowed method. Move at your natural quick pace, but double-check details given Mercury's retrograde tendency toward small errors.
gemeaux.energy: This is a naturally energized day for you, air meeting air, self meeting self, even under the waning crescent's dim light. Use the mental spark wisely rather than scattering it across too many directions.
gemeaux.intuition: Self-knowledge arrives easily today, quick flashes of clarity about your own direction. Trust the first honest answer that comes to you before you talk yourself into a more complicated one.
gemeaux.mantra: I trust my first honest thought over my second-guessing.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon moves into Gemini at 7 degrees, settling into your twelfth house of retreat and the unconscious, as the waning crescent dims to 12.4 percent light. Your own Sun advances to 18 degrees, and Mercury remains retrograde in your sign, deepening this pull toward inward reflection rather than outward engagement. Let today be quieter than most; the New Moon arriving in your own sign is only two days away.
cancer.love: Words may still misfire under Mercury's retrograde, so let presence substitute for explanation today. A partner who simply sits with you says more than one who tries to reason things through.
cancer.work: Solitary tasks, review, planning, quiet preparation, suit you far better than collaborative or public efforts today. Save your energy; you will need clarity of mind for what the New Moon will ask of you soon.
cancer.energy: Rest is not optional right now but genuinely restorative, twelfth house Moon meeting waning crescent light in a rare double call for withdrawal. Honor it without guilt.
cancer.intuition: Dreams and subtle feelings carry unusually direct information this week. Keep a notebook by your bed; what surfaces in half-sleep may matter more than anything said aloud today.
cancer.mantra: I trust the quiet more than I trust the noise.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon at 7 degrees Gemini enters your eleventh house of friendship and community, its light waning to 12.4 percent as the Cancer Sun continues to warm your twelfth house of quiet reflection. This is a day for reassessing which social connections genuinely feed you, viewed through a lighter, more curious lens than usual. Let yourself observe rather than perform within your circles today.
lion.love: A friend's opinion on your relationship may surface today; weigh it honestly rather than dismissing or over-trusting it. The Gemini Moon favors gathering information before deciding what it means to you.
lion.work: Networking and group communication move easily today, quick exchanges that plant seeds for future collaboration. Keep messages brief and let ideas circulate rather than forcing immediate outcomes.
lion.energy: Your usual radiant energy turns more mentally social than physically expressive today. Conversation itself, rather than performance, is where your vitality wants to flow.
lion.intuition: You sense clearly which social ties are mutual and which are one-sided, even beneath friendly surface chatter. Trust that read; it will matter more once the New Moon arrives.
lion.mantra: I notice who truly shows up for me.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon enters Gemini at 7 degrees, lighting your tenth house of career and public life as the waning crescent narrows to 12.4 percent. Mercury, your ruler, remains retrograde in Cancer within your career sector, so expect old professional questions to resurface rather than entirely new ones to appear. Move through today's obligations competently but without rushing any final decisions.
vierge.love: A partner may notice you are more preoccupied with work than usual; a brief, honest acknowledgment of this keeps the connection warm without requiring you to fully disengage from professional focus.
vierge.work: Mercury retrograde in your tenth house means rereading old proposals, revisiting a paused negotiation, or clarifying a miscommunication with a superior is more useful than launching anything new. Patience here pays off within the week.
vierge.energy: Mental energy is high but scattered today; contain it by making lists and tackling one professional thread at a time rather than juggling several simultaneously.
vierge.intuition: A quiet doubt about your public direction, one Mercury retrograde keeps resurfacing, deserves honest examination rather than dismissal. Trust the pattern you keep noticing, not just the isolated incident.
vierge.mantra: I revisit what needs revisiting without panic.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon at 7 degrees Gemini enters your ninth house of belief and distant horizons, its waning light thinning to 12.4 percent as the Cancer Sun continues to anchor your tenth house of career. This pairing favors reconsidering a philosophy or a long-term plan through conversation rather than solitary reflection. Talk it through with someone whose perspective you trust today.
balance.love: Differing views about the future, travel, lifestyle, long-term goals, are easier to discuss today than they have been recently. Approach the conversation with curiosity rather than the need to be right.
balance.work: A professional plan connected to growth, expansion, or further learning benefits from being talked through aloud today. Saying it to another person clarifies what you actually believe versus what you have only assumed.
balance.energy: Your usual social and diplomatic energy turns more intellectually curious today. Let stimulating conversation replace the need for physical exertion; both restore you differently but equally well.
balance.intuition: A belief you have carried for a long time may loosen slightly today under this airy Gemini Moon. Notice which ideas still feel true when spoken aloud and which no longer do.
balance.mantra: I speak my beliefs aloud to see which ones still hold.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon moves into Gemini at 7 degrees, activating your eighth house of shared resources and transformation, its light waning to 12.4 percent illumination. The Cancer Sun continues to warm your ninth house of meaning, adding a philosophical undertone to practical questions about what you owe and are owed. Approach today's financial or emotional reckonings with curiosity rather than your usual intensity.
scorpion.love: A conversation about emotional or financial entanglement moves more easily today if you let it stay light rather than immediately going deep. Trust that seriousness can arrive gradually rather than all at once.
scorpion.work: A shared financial matter, a contract, a joint account, a negotiated fee, benefits from being discussed plainly today rather than left to simmer. Quick clarity now prevents a bigger conversation later.
scorpion.energy: Your usual depth turns quicker and more mentally restless today, less brooding, more searching. Use this lighter energy to gather information rather than forcing immediate transformation.
scorpion.intuition: You pick up on subtle inconsistencies in what someone says about shared resources today; trust the small detail that does not quite add up. It is worth a direct question rather than silent suspicion.
scorpion.mantra: I ask the direct question instead of carrying silent doubt.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon at 7 degrees Gemini, your opposite sign, activates your seventh house of partnership, its waning light thinning to 12.4 percent illumination. The Cancer Sun continues moving through your eighth house of intimacy and shared resources, adding emotional depth beneath today's lighter, conversational lunar mood. A partner's perspective deserves genuine consideration rather than your usual instinct to charge ahead alone.
sagittaire.love: A partner wants to talk today, and the Gemini Moon rewards you for actually engaging rather than deflecting with humor. Let the conversation wander; it may reveal something useful about where you both stand.
sagittaire.work: A collaboration or negotiation benefits from quick, responsive communication today rather than grand gestures. Answer messages promptly and let practical details get settled through simple back-and-forth.
sagittaire.energy: Your usual expansive energy turns more relational today, focused on exchange rather than solo pursuit. Let a conversation partner match your pace rather than always setting it yourself.
sagittaire.intuition: You sense accurately what a partner truly needs from you right now, even if they have not said it directly. Trust that quiet read over your instinct to assume everything is fine.
sagittaire.mantra: I listen as generously as I like to speak.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon moves into Gemini at 7 degrees, lighting your sixth house of routine and wellbeing as the waning crescent narrows to 12.4 percent illumination. The Cancer Sun continues its passage through your seventh house, keeping a close relationship in sharp focus even as today's attention turns toward daily maintenance. Small adjustments to your habits matter more than any dramatic overhaul right now.
capricorne.love: A partner's daily habits or way of communicating about logistics may need brief discussion today. Keep it practical rather than emotional; the Gemini Moon favors solving small problems quickly.
capricorne.work: Routine tasks, scheduling, correspondence, small fixes, move quickly and satisfyingly today. Clear your daily obligations so that focus is freed for the New Moon's deeper questions arriving soon.
capricorne.energy: Mental energy runs ahead of physical energy today; use it for organizing and planning rather than sustained labor. A short walk between tasks keeps your usual discipline from turning rigid.
capricorne.intuition: A small, recurring irritation in your daily routine is trying to tell you something worth addressing. Trust the pattern rather than dismissing it as a minor annoyance.
capricorne.mantra: I fix the small things before they become large ones.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon at 7 degrees Gemini enters your fifth house of creativity and romance, its waning light thinning to 12.4 percent illumination as Pluto retrograde continues its slow restructuring within your own sign. Neptune retrograde in Aries keeps your ninth house of belief dreamy and unresolved, but today's lighter Gemini Moon favors playful creative expression over heavy philosophical searching.
verseau.love: Flirtation, wit, and shared jokes deepen a connection today more than serious conversation would. Let romance feel light and quick rather than forcing depth before it is ready.
verseau.work: A creative idea benefits from being talked through with someone else today rather than developed in isolation. Quick brainstorming under this Gemini Moon may unlock an angle you had not considered.
verseau.energy: Your usual intellectual restlessness finds a pleasant outlet in playful, low-stakes creative activity today. Let curiosity lead rather than any pressure to produce something significant.
verseau.intuition: A spontaneous creative impulse, however small or silly it seems, is worth acting on today. The Gemini Moon favors quick experiments over carefully planned ones.
verseau.mantra: I let play lead me somewhere useful.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon moves into Gemini at 7 degrees, lighting your fourth house of home and family as the waning crescent thins to 12.4 percent illumination. This pairing of airy Moon and domestic house creates a day for lighter conversations at home rather than deep emotional processing. Neptune retrograde continues its resonant pull on your inner world, but today favors simple, practical family exchange.
poissons.love: A conversation with a partner about home life, chores, plans, small logistics, flows more easily today than it might on a heavier day. Keep the tone light even while addressing something practical.
poissons.work: If you work from home, today favors organizing your space and handling small domestic-adjacent tasks over deep creative or emotional labor. Let efficiency be enough for now.
poissons.energy: Your usual emotional depth takes a lighter, more conversational form today. Let family or housemates in on your thoughts rather than processing everything alone as you might normally prefer.
poissons.intuition: A comment from a family member carries more insight than its casual tone suggests. Listen for what is actually being said beneath the small talk.
poissons.mantra: I let home be a place of easy, honest talk.
poissons.author: Sibylle
